chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 07 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For order on CMA No. 1160/25 (U/A) 2) For order on CM No 1161/25. ------------- 13.05.2025. Mr. Abdul Latif Chandio, Advocate for Applicant. ________________ 1. Granted. 2. Through this Application, the Applicant seeks recalling of Order dated 14.04.2025. The said order reads as under:- “None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received, whereas, on 12.11.2018 Applicant’s Counsel was directed to reformulate the Questions of Law as despite repeated chances, the Applicant’s Counsel had failed to make compliance of the order. Matter was adjourned with a note of caution that if compliance has not been made, the Reference Applications will be dismissed without further orders. It appears that the order is yet to be complied with. Accordingly, all these Reference Applications are dismissed for non- prosecution.” Perusal of the record so recorded in the above order clearly reflects that the Applicant’s Counsel has not been vigilant in pursuing these matters and never bothered to appear before the Court and now merely for a fact that a new Counsel has been engaged does not entitle the Applicant to seek any indulgence. The Applicant ought to have remained vigilant as well. In view of such position, this application, being misconceived, is hereby dismissed. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Ayaz
